title: The Long Road
description: Word reached the capital of strange happenings to the west — a bandit-held bridge, an ancient dungeon disturbed, a sage who claims to know why. Follow the trail to its source and decide what to do with what you find.
introduction: You set out west with little more than your gear and a name on a folded scrap of parchment. Whatever waits at the end of the road, the journey to it begins here — at the bridge.
